page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.16xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of vCPUs to physical cores, this instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. For network connectivity, the instance offers a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps, supporting high-throughput data transfers.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g5ne.16xlarge provides a high density of dedicated physical cores and balanced memory allocation, making it suitable for workloads requiring consistent compute performance without the resource contention of shared threads. This hardware profile is well-suited for enterprise applications, web serving, database hosting, and general-purpose business-critical workloads that demand stable CPU execution and substantial network throughput.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute performance without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per vCPU ratio. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 30 Gbps. This configuration is designed for enterprise applications, database hosting, and high-throughput web serving workloads requiring stable, dedicated CPU resources.
